overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic Asian-inspired urban district. The player moves from a covered pedestrian walkway under an elevated highway, crosses intersections, follows an NPC in a yellow jacket along graffiti-lined streets, and enters a dark underpass. The environment features neon signage, mixed traditional and futuristic architecture, and dynamic lighting with strong midday shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: passes by a pedestrian with a 'Talk' interaction prompt visible
approaching open intersection as the covered walkway ends

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the green pedestrian path under the elevated highway, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking in the same direction ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure casting shadows over the pedestrian path
multi-story red building with balconies and graffiti on lower levels
smooth concrete wall running parallel to the pedestrian walkway
distinctive green paved surface marking the pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a green pedestrian path sheltered beneath an elevated highway. The concrete overpass creates dappled shadows while a red apartment building lines the left side. The player passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction and approaches an intersection where the covered walkway ends.

events.description: exits covered walkway into bright open intersection with yellow crosswalk markings
purple truck drives across the intersection from left to right
turns left to walk up concrete stairs toward commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped intersection and turning toward a stairway leading to upper pedestrian level

notable_agents.action: purple truck crossing the intersection perpendicular to the player's path

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
tall modern glass building visible in the distance beyond the intersection
wide stairs leading up to a higher pedestrian plaza level

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered walkway into a bright sunlit intersection with bold yellow crosswalk markings. A purple truck passes through the intersection as the player crosses the street. The scene transitions to approaching a wide concrete stairway leading up to a commercial area with visible neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian street with neon signage

events.description: ascends concrete stairs to upper pedestrian level
begins following an NPC wearing a distinctive yellow jacket

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs and following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket along a commercial street lined with shops

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking ahead, serving as a guide through the district

entered.detail: large pink neon sign reading 'HOTEL' mounted on a building facade
tall vertical billboard with circular logo and purple branding
building with green painted exterior and external air conditioning units
silver metal barrier separating pedestrian path from the street

segments.scene_description: The player ascends wide concrete stairs into a bustling commercial area with hanging paper lanterns and neon signage. A prominent pink 'HOTEL' sign and a large 'Kiroshi Optics' billboard dominate the skyline. The player begins following an NPC in a yellow jacket who leads the way along a green pedestrian path bordered by a metal guardrail.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with graffiti art

events.description: passing extensive graffiti murals covering the left wall

agents.ego_description: closely following the NPC in the yellow jacket along a graffiti-lined pedestrian path

notable_agents.action: character in yellow jacket and white shorts walking steadily ahead

entered.detail: long concrete wall covered in colorful tags and street art in various colors
tall industrial transmission tower with multiple cross-arms and wires

segments.scene_description: The player continues following the yellow-jacketed NPC along a green pedestrian walkway bordered by an extensive graffiti-covered wall on the left. The path runs parallel to a street with parked vehicles, while a large utility transmission tower rises in the distance against the clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial hotel entrance with vending machines

events.description: approaching hotel entrance with prominent neon signage and vending machines
entering shadowed area under building awning with neon arrow signs

agents.ego_description: walking past a burrito vending machine and hotel entrance, moving toward a covered walkway

entered.detail: retro-style teal and orange vending machine with 'BURRITO' signage and food images
bright cyan neon arrow pointing left, mounted on building corner
shadowed pedestrian passage beneath building overhang

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a hotel entrance marked by a large pink neon 'HOTEL' sign and passes a distinctive teal burrito vending machine. The environment transitions from open sidewalk to a covered walkway with cyan neon arrow signs, as the lighting shifts from bright sunlight to shadowed areas under the building awning.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass beneath highway with artificial lighting

events.description: enters dark tunnel-like underpass with graffiti-covered walls
approaching bright exit at the far end of the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit concrete underpass toward the light at the distant exit

entered.detail: low concrete ceiling with exposed beams and sparse artificial lighting
large metal air vent mounted on the underpass wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark, narrow underpass beneath the highway, where natural light is replaced by sparse artificial lighting and the walls are covered in graffiti. The camera moves through the tunnel-like space toward a bright exit visible at the far end, with vehicles visible on the road to the right separated by a metal railing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban walkway into a sun-drenched commercial district before descending into a dark underpass. It begins along a green pedestrian path beneath the dappled shadows of an elevated highway, moving past red apartment buildings toward a bright, open intersection. As the camera emerges into the sunlight and crosses a yellow-marked street, the scene ascends a wide concrete stairway into a bustling area filled with hanging lanterns and towering neon billboards. The perspective then follows an NPC in a yellow jacket along a graffiti-lined walkway and past a teal vending machine, while the lighting shifts from brilliant midday glare to the cool shadows of a building awning. Finally, the camera enters a narrow, dimly lit underpass where the vibrant city colors fade into concrete walls and artificial light, moving steadily toward a bright exit at the far end.
